content.speakerText: Alright, you're all set! Let me know if you need help with anything.
content.speakerTextCn: 好了，你都搞定了！有事随时找我。
expectedAnswers: Thanks so much! I really appreciate your support.
Thank you, Lisa—you've made this so much easier!
Appreciate it! I'll definitely reach out if I have questions.
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否明确表达了感谢并回应了对方的开放支持
语言准确性：语法和用词是否正确，是否避免了过于随意或生硬的表达
表达自然度：是否符合英语母语者的日常职场语气
关键词覆盖：是否使用了 'appreciate', 'support', 'thank' 等关键词

content.speakerText: See you tomorrow at 9! Don't be nervous—you're gonna do great.
content.speakerTextCn: 明天9点见！别紧张，你一定会做得很棒。
expectedAnswers: Thanks for the encouragement—I'm feeling much more confident now!
See you tomorrow! I'll be ready and on time.
I really appreciate that—I'll give it my best shot!
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否正面回应了鼓励，并传递积极态度
语言准确性：是否避免了消极或不确定表达（如 'I might fail'）
表达自然度：是否使用了符合职场语境的口语表达
关键词覆盖：是否使用了 'encouragement', 'confident', 'best shot' 等关键词
